blended.narrative: Lookout Pass is looking at a significant storm over the next 48 hours, with 17 inches of snowfall of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 3,486 ft. Looking ahead, 23 inches possible over the next 14 days.

Tomorrow: 12" of heavy snow, highs of 30°F. Expect variable conditions.
Saturday: 6" of snow, highs of 31°F. Expect variable conditions.
Wednesday: 2.4" of snow, highs of 30°F. Expect variable conditions.

recent_conditions.narrative: 16.8" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is building — up 4" over the past week. Current depth: 37".
